data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data, whether at rest or in transit, are securely encrypted.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 and TLS encryptions protect user information and video data.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Provides an additional security layer for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Google Authenticator or SMS-based verification used for account login validity.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Prevents Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: Uses global load balancing and traffic throttling to mitigate attack impact.

data.title: Content Moderation and Flagging
data.description: Combines AI and human review to maintain platform integrity and user safety.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms detect and flag potentially harmful content for review.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic evaluations to assess and strengthen security measures.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes third-party services and internal audits to identify vulnerabilities.
